## PR Title Format
```
<type>: <short description>
```

### Bump Reference

| Bump                  | Type                                  | When to use                             |
|-----------------------|---------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------|
| **Major**             | `feat!`                               | Breaks backwards compatibility          |
| **Minor**             | `feat`                                | New functionality, backwards compatible |
| **Patch**             | `fix`                                 | Bug fixes                               |
| **Patch** *(default)* | `chore` `refactor` `docs` `test` `ci` | Everything else                         |

---

> If you are using **squash merge**, the PR title becomes the commit message on master.  
> Make sure your PR title follows the format above before merging.
